title: stelis tricolor
intro: Stelis tricolor is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its unique and vibrant tri-colored flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis tricolor include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Stelis tricolor often involve drying and processing the flowers and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, and other medicinal concoctions.
